alerts.raw_alert: Unusual authentication pattern detected. User account j.smith@company.com logged in from IP 185.234.219.50 (geolocation: Russia) at 03:47 UTC. Account normally authenticates from London, UK during business hours. 15 failed attempts preceded successful login. Account has access to financial systems and customer database.
SSL certificate for api.internal.company.com will expire in 14 days on 2026-05-23. Certificate authority: DigiCert. Affects internal API gateway used by development and staging environments only.

Ransomware signature detected on workstation DESKTOP-HR-042 in HR department network segment. File encryption activity observed across 3,847 files in past 6 minutes. Lateral movement detected to file server FS-HR-01. Network isolation not yet applied.

Data exfiltration pattern detected from workstation DESKTOP-FIN-019 assigned to user m.chen@company.com. 2.3GB transferred to external IP 203.0.113.45 over port 443 in last 2 hours. Destination IP flagged in threat intelligence database as known data broker.

Privilege escalation attempt detected. Service account svc_backup attempted to add itself to Domain Admins group at 16:44 UTC. Attempt blocked by policy. Account svc_backup should not have interactive login capabilities. Last legitimate use: automated backup job at 02:00 UTC daily.
Routine vulnerability scan complete. 3 low severity CVEs detected on development server DEV-03. All relate to outdated npm packages. No production systems affected. Remediation window: next sprint.
